situation: audit-2026-07-07-047 finding SZ-BG-L-006 (low): filterByRegion uses fixed 2% expandRatio regardless of region size. Small regions (<5% area) have higher relative detection error → 2% buffer insufficient, boundary text falsely filtered. Large regions (>30% area) already cover most of image → 2% expansion overextends, letting in-product text leak through.
action: Made expandRatio dynamic by region area: small regions (<5%) get max(expandRatio, 0.06) for wider buffer; large regions (>30%) get min(expandRatio, 0.01) to tighten. Updated test copy in filter-region.test.ts to match source + added 2 new test cases covering both branches. All 16 tests pass.
outcome_evidence: Commit 546f652 on auto/opt-background-1783213292 (amended into existing SZ-BG-L-006 commit). vitest run tests/filter-region.test.ts: 16/16 passed including 2 new SZ-BG-L-006 cases. Pushed to origin.
next_suggestion: SZ-BG-L-007: maskToBoundingBox discards large detections while VL shrinks them — inconsistent bbox normalization
SZ-BG-L-008: pipelineProgress sendMessage fire-and-forget swallows all errors
SZ-SP-L-001: deletedStack stale closure in handleRegionsChange

audit_findings.finding: filterByRegion used fixed expandRatio=0.02 for all region sizes. Small regions (<5% area) had insufficient buffer causing boundary text false-filter; large regions (>30%) over-expanded letting in-product text leak.
audit_findings.remediation: Dynamic expandRatio: max(ratio, 0.06) for area<0.05, min(ratio, 0.01) for area>0.30. Applied and tested.
